Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Fields | Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public class

ArrayUtils

extends Object
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.android.internal.util.ArrayUtils

Class Overview

Static utility methods for arrays that aren't already included in Arrays.

Summary

Fields
public static final File[] EMPTY_FILE

public static boolean[] appendBooleanDuplicatesAllowed (boolean[] cur, boolean val)

Adds value to given array. The method allows duplicate values.

Parameters
cur boolean
val boolean
Returns
boolean[]

Adds value to given array.

Parameters
kind Class
array T
element T
allowDuplicates boolean
Returns
T[]

public static T[] appendElement (Class<T> kind, T[] array, T element)

Adds value to given array if not already present, providing set-like behavior.

Parameters
kind Class
array T
element T
Returns
T[]

Adds value to given array.

cur int
val int
allowDuplicates boolean

cur long
val long
allowDuplicates boolean

public static void checkBounds (int len, int index)

Throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException if the index is out of bounds.

Parameters
len int: length of the array. Must be non-negative
index int: the index to check
Throws
ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException if the index is out of bounds of the array

public static T[] cloneOrNull (T[] array)

Clones an array or returns null if the array is null.

Parameters
array T
Returns
T[]

public static ArraySet<T> cloneOrNull (ArraySet<T> array)

Parameters
array ArraySet
Returns
ArraySet<T>

public static long[] cloneOrNull (long[] array)

Parameters
array long
Returns
long[]

public static T[] concat (Class<T> kind, T... arrays)

Returns the concatenation of the given arrays. Only works for object arrays, not for primitive arrays. See concat(byte[]) for a variant that works on byte arrays.

Parameters
kind Class: The class of the array elements
arrays T: The arrays to concatenate. Null arrays are treated as empty.
Returns
T[] A single array containing all the elements of the parameter arrays.

public static byte[] concat (byte... arrays)

Returns the concatenation of the given byte arrays. Null arrays are treated as empty.

Parameters
arrays byte
Returns
byte[]

public static boolean contains (T[] array, T value)

Checks that value is present as at least one of the elements of the array.

Parameters
array T: the array to check in
value T: the value to check for
Returns
boolean true if the value is present in the array

public static boolean contains (int[] array, int value)

Parameters
array int
value int
Returns
boolean

Parameters
cur Collection
val T
Returns
boolean

Parameters
array char
value char
Returns
boolean

Parameters
array long
value long
Returns
boolean

Test if all check items are contained in array.

array char
check char
Returns
boolean

Test if all check items are contained in array.

Parameters
array T
check T
Returns
boolean

Test if any check items are contained in array.

Parameters
array T
check T
Returns
boolean

val int

int[]

public static T[] emptyArray (Class<T> kind)

Returns an empty array of the specified type. The intent is that it will return the same empty array every time to avoid reallocation, although this is not guaranteed.

Parameters
kind Class
Returns
T[]

public static T[] emptyIfNull (T[] items, Class<T> kind)

Returns the same array or an empty one if it's null.

Parameters
items T
kind Class
Returns
T[]

public static boolean equals (byte[] array1, byte[] array2, int length)

Checks if the beginnings of two byte arrays are equal.

Parameters
array1 byte: the first byte array
array2 byte: the second byte array
length int: the number of bytes to check
Returns
boolean true if they're equal, false otherwise

public static T[] filter (T[] items, IntFunction<T[]> arrayConstructor, Predicate<T> predicate)

Returns an array containing elements from the given one that match the given predicate. The returned array may, in some cases, be the reference to the input array.

Parameters
items T
arrayConstructor IntFunction
predicate Predicate
Returns
T[]

public static T[] filterNotNull (T[] val, IntFunction<T[]> arrayConstructor)

Returns an array with values from val minus null values

Parameters
val T
arrayConstructor IntFunction: typically T[]::new e.g. String[]::new
Returns
T[]

public static T find (T[] items, Predicate<T> predicate)

Returns the first element from the array for which condition predicate is true, or null if there is no such element

Parameters
items T
predicate Predicate
Returns
T

public static T firstOrNull (T[] items)

Parameters
items T
Returns
T

public static T getOrNull (T[] items, int i)

Returns the i-th item in items, if it exists and items is not null, otherwise returns null.

Parameters
items T
i int
Returns
T

public static int indexOf (T[] array, T value)

Return first index of value in array, or -1 if not found.

Parameters
array T
value T
Returns
int

public static boolean referenceEquals (ArrayList<T> a, ArrayList<T> b)

Returns true if the two ArrayLists are equal with respect to the objects they contain. The objects must be in the same order and be reference equal (== not .equals()).

Parameters
a ArrayList
b ArrayList
Returns
boolean

Parameters
cur ArraySet
val T
Returns
ArraySet<T>

cur ArrayList
val T
Returns
ArrayList<T>

Removes value from given array if present, providing set-like behavior.

kind Class
array T
element T
Returns
T[]

Removes value from given array if present, providing set-like behavior.

val int

Removes value from given array if present, providing set-like behavior.

Parameters
cur long
val long

Removes value from given array if present, providing set-like behavior.

cur String

Length of the given collection or 0 if it's null.

Parameters
cur byte
val byte
Returns
boolean

public static void throwsIfOutOfBounds (int len, int offset, int count)

Throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException if the range is out of bounds.

Parameters
len int: length of the array. Must be non-negative
offset int: start index of the range. Must be non-negative
count int: length of the range. Must be non-negative
Throws
ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException if the range from offset with length count is out of bounds of the array

public static List<T> toList (T[] array)

Creates a List from an array. Different from Arrays.asList(Object[]) as that will use the parameter as the backing array, meaning changes are not isolated.

Parameters
array T
Returns
List<T>

public static long total (long[] array)

Parameters
array long
Returns
long

public static T[] trimToSize (T[] array, int size)

Parameters
array T
size int
Returns
T[]

public static int unstableRemoveIf (ArrayList<T> collection, Predicate<T> predicate)

Removes elements that match the predicate in an efficient way that alters the order of elements in the collection. This should only be used if order is not important.

Parameters
collection ArrayList: The ArrayList from which to remove elements.
predicate Predicate: The predicate that each element is tested against.
Returns
int the number of elements removed.
